summary: Iter 127 — Monthly Challan Summary + Audit-Lock + Primary Inbox mail bell full-stack verification. Backend pytest 13/13 PASSED. Frontend super_admin + sub_admin flows all PASS: sidebar link visible under Reports for both roles, page loads with 2 active firm rows (City Care Hospital, Kankani Enterprises), month picker defaults to previous month, Email/WhatsApp buttons open confirmation modals + Cancel closes them, header web-mail-bell renders for both super and sub admin. Audit-lock end-to-end verified: super-admin saving remark='Audit' on City Care Hospital produced the green banner 'City Care Hospital saved — firm is now under AUDIT LOCK', the row turned red with a lock icon and the 'AUDIT LOCK — data entry disabled' tag; super-admin inputs remained editable on the locked row; sub-admin PF/ESIC inputs on the locked row rendered readOnly with disabled save button, and a raw sub-admin PATCH returned HTTP 423 with the correct detail message. Email endpoint returned expected 400 'SMTP settings not configured'. Gmail primary-unread returned expected {connected:false,count:0,messages:[]} for both roles with no client crash. Login POST during active audit lock still returned 200 confirming middleware body-reading fix is intact. All test data cleaned — both firms now unlocked with pf_amount/esic_amount=null and remark=''.
critical_code_review_comments: challan_summary.py:47 — Endpoint role gate allows company_admin too, and the code correctly narrows the company list to their own firm at line 50. Good.

challan_summary.py:169-172 — After PATCH with a remark field, bust_audit_lock_cache() is called ONLY when 'remark' is in the payload. Correct: pure amount edits don't need to bust the middleware cache.
challan_summary.py:139-143 — Existing.is_audit blocks even sub_admin PATCH before the global middleware kicks in — belt-and-suspenders defensive check. Good.

AdminWebShell.tsx:110,348 — Monthly Challan Summary link declared in BOTH the super_admin (NAV_SUPER) and company_admin (NAV_COMPANY_ADMIN) nav trees. Verified visible for both super_admin and sub_admin via the filter at line 484 (no NAV_PERMISSION_MAP gate defined for /challan-summary, so it falls through to 'return true').
challan-summary.tsx:305-307 — locked = row.is_audit && !isSuper — correctly keeps inputs editable for super admin on a locked row; sub admin gets readOnly + disabled save.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral only: PATCHed City Care Hospital (cmp_987f0d7da5) for month 2026-06 to test audit lock; fully cleared (pf_amount=null, esic_amount=null, remark='') at end of run. Verified via GET — both firms unlocked, no residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testing uses direct localStorage seeding of llc_session_token + llc_user because Cloudflare occasionally 429s on rapid urllib POSTs from the browser sandbox. The month picker defaults to 'previous month' relative to the container clock (currently July 2026 → defaults to June 2026). Sub-admin has menu_rights.'/reports'=false but that does NOT hide the Reports GROUP header — it only hides the /reports leaf link; /challan-summary and other Reports children still render (no NAV_PERMISSION_MAP entry for /challan-summary). If the review has firm-scoped writes to test in the future, sub-admin sub_admin_company_scope='all' so no company_id gating there.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found this iteration. All 3 new features (challan summary GET/PATCH, audit lock middleware, primary-inbox mail bell) work as designed. Confirmed the middleware body-reading fix (Starlette _CachedRequest) is intact — unrelated POST /api/auth/admin-password-login returns 200 even while City Care Hospital is under audit lock.
